info.name: MACE — OpenEnv HTTP API
info.description:
Multi-Agent Aviation Control & Oversight Environment served by FastAPI (openenv `create_app` + MACE **stateful HTTP**).

**Base URL:** set `baseUrl` (default `http://127.0.0.1:7860`). Hugging Face: `https://YOUR_SPACE_ID.hf.space` (no trailing slash).

**HTTP sessions:** `POST /reset` then `POST /step` share one environment per **`X-OpenEnv-Session-Id`** header. Omit the header to use the shared `default` session (fine for a single Postman tab).

**WebSocket:** `{{wsBaseUrl}}/ws` still works for persistent sessions with message types `reset` | `step` | `state` | `close`.

**Tasks:** `task_id` in reset body: `easy` | `medium` | `hard`.

**Actions:** `GET /schema` → `action`, or see *Environment control*.

variable.description: Use wss:// on Hugging Face Spaces

request.description: Lightweight JSON for platform probes (Hugging Face, load balancers).
Some proxies use HEAD for readiness.
Full OpenAPI document (all paths and models).
Environment name, description, version (fresh env instance).
MACE: same HTTP session as `/reset`/`/step` (optional header `X-OpenEnv-Session-Id`). Call `POST /reset` first or you get 400.

item.name: Environment control (HTTP)
item.description:
MACE replaces stock OpenEnv HTTP control with **session-scoped** `/reset`, `/step`, and `/state`. Send optional header **`X-OpenEnv-Session-Id`** (same value on each request in a run). Omit it to use the built-in `default` session.

Order: **reset → step → step …**

request.description: Optional fields: `seed`, `episode_id`, `task_id` (`easy` | `medium` | `hard`). Extra keys allowed by OpenEnv reset model.
Call **POST /reset** in the same session first. Optional header `X-OpenEnv-Session-Id`. `MACEAction`: `kind` required; see `/schema`.
Easy task: flights `AC001`–`AC003`. Adjust IDs from your last observation.

item.name: WebSocket /ws (session)
item.description:
Multi-step rollouts need a **WebSocket** connection (this collection’s HTTP tab cannot send WS frames).

**In Postman:** New → **WebSocket** → URL:
- Local: `ws://127.0.0.1:7860/ws`
- Hugging Face: `wss://YOUR_SPACE.hf.space/ws`

Or set variable `wsBaseUrl` to `ws://127.0.0.1:7860` / `wss://YOUR_SPACE.hf.space` and open **`{{wsBaseUrl}}/ws`** in a WebSocket request.

**Messages (send as JSON text):**

1. Reset
```json
{"type":"reset","data":{"seed":42,"episode_id":"ws-1","task_id":"easy"}}
```

2. Step (noop)
```json
{"type":"step","data":{"kind":"noop","metadata":{}}}
```

3. State
```json
{"type":"state"}
```

4. Close
```json
{"type":"close"}
```

**Responses:** `type` = `observation` (`data` has observation/reward/done), `state`, or `error`.

request.description: Run this before opening a WebSocket. Then create a separate **WebSocket** request to `{{wsBaseUrl}}/ws` (not this HTTP tab).

item.name: MCP (optional)
item.description: JSON-RPC 2.0 over HTTP when the environment exposes MCP tools.

request.description: Adjust `method` / `params` per OpenEnv MCP docs; MACE may or may not expose tools.
